sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, original_date Date, modified_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, original_date) VALUES (1, toDate('2024-01-01'));
UPDATE test_dates SET modified_date = subtractMonths(original_date, 1) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, original_date, modified_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, original_date, subtractMonths(original_date, 3) AS three_months_earlier FROM test_dates;
